nodes.title: SDXL Inpaint · fg (Juggernaut X)

widgets_values: Assess the final five-layer camera view and release readiness.
nodes.title: 🧪 Agentic Output Assessment

widgets_values:
ATLAS STAGED MASTER · PORTAL (neat rails edition)

Flow: 1 SOURCE+VLM -> 2 SOLVE GATE -> 3 DEPTH -> 4 SKY -> 5-8 BAND LAYERS
-> 9 MASTER VIEWPORT -> 10 EXPORTS -> 11 AGENTIC ASSESS.

* Rails (Set/Get): plate, solve, depth, sky_mask + the VLM prompt rails
  (p_*/g_*/b_*) feed every stage without wire spaghetti.
* First queue: VLM assessment only (image gate). Read the report, press
  ▶ Continue Workflow, then ✅ Approve Solve on the gate.
* LAYER SWITCHES (rgthree) bypasses whole layer groups: the solve chain
  passes through a bypassed layer, so 2-3 layer variants queue instantly.
* SDXL inpaint: juggernautXL_versionXInpaint at native 1024, 32 steps,
  fixed per-layer seeds, perspective preserved.
* Depth: MoGe (interior specialist; also feeds relight normals).
* This is an interior plate: the 'sky' layer catches the portal/void
  backdrop; the VLM usually re-prompts it. Empty prompts self-disarm.
nodes.title: README
